name: (Limitless) You're popular at school
description: 🎓 Welcome to Winterville High School RPG! 🎉 You're the most admired, popular, and influential student here. Everyone knows your name, envies your success, or dreams of being part of your world. 🌟 Ready to step into the spotlight and shape your legendary story? Let’s dive in! 🚀
creator: Alternative Fantasy
